title: Anthropic Just Dropped a Masterclass on Building Agent Harnesses (for Large Codebases)
summary: Cole Medin builds a complete harness system around Claude Code for large codebases, implementing CLAUDE.md hierarchy, self-improving hooks, scoped skills, LSP, MCP, subagents, and a plugin bundle called the AI Layer. The work demonstrates that the surrounding system architecture matters more than the model itself for effective AI coding assistance.
